overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a luxury high-rise apartment in Night City. The player character walks through the modern living space, looks out at the futuristic cityscape, interacts with an automated drink dispenser, and enters an elevator. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon lighting, holographic interfaces, and gritty urban details.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living room with panoramic city views

events.description: approaches the large windows to look out at the Night City skyline
turns away from the window and moves deeper into the apartment

agents.ego_description: walking through the luxury apartment living room and pausing to admire the futuristic cityscape through floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: large black television screen mounted on the wall
tall glass windows offering view of the city skyline
futuristic skyscrapers and buildings of Night City visible through the windows
contemporary couch in the living room area
round table with bottles and items on it

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxury high-rise apartment living room with modern furnishings. The camera approaches the floor-to-ceiling windows to reveal a stunning view of Night City's skyline, including a prominent building with '03' signage, before turning to explore the interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: entertainment lounge with pool table and automated bar

events.description: moves from living room area into the entertainment lounge with pool table
approaches the automated drink dispenser at the bar counter

agents.ego_description: moving through the apartment toward the bar area, passing the pool table and hexagonal ceiling light fixture

entered.detail: red-felt pool table with balls arranged for play
large geometric neon light fixture hanging from the ceiling
long counter with stools and drink preparation area
automated beverage machine with holographic menu display

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the living room to an entertainment area featuring a red pool table and striking hexagonal ceiling light. The camera moves toward the bar area where an automated drink dispenser with a holographic interface becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: automated beverage station with holographic interface

events.description: interacts with the drink dispenser interface to select a beverage
retrieves a cup from the automated dispenser's delivery slot

agents.ego_description: using the holographic drink dispenser to get a beverage, reaching out to take the cup from the machine

entered.detail: glowing blue interface displaying drink options and Japanese text
wall-mounted shelves containing various bottles and decorative items

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the automated bar and interacts with the holographic drink dispenser. A hand reaches out to retrieve a cup from the machine while the camera focuses on the glowing interface and surrounding bottle shelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment corridor leading to residential elevator

events.description: leaves the bar area and walks toward the elevator lobby
approaches the elevator area with metal gate doors and control panel

agents.ego_description: walking through the apartment from the bar area toward the residential elevator, passing by the window views

entered.detail: metal gate elevator entrance with call button panel
colorful poster on the wall near the elevator

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bar and walks through the apartment toward the elevator lobby. The floor-to-ceiling windows are now on the right side, showing the city view, while the character approaches the metal-gated elevator entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty residential elevator with graffiti and metal interior

events.description: enters the elevator car with wooden walls and graffiti
metal elevator doors close, enclosing the space

agents.ego_description: entering the elevator and waiting as the metal doors close for the descent

entered.detail: enclosed space with wooden panel walls and metal fixtures
sliding metal gate doors that close to seal the elevator
wooden wall with NCPD and other graffiti tags
digital panel with floor selection buttons showing '12: APARTMENTS'

segments.scene_description: The character enters the residential elevator, revealing a gritty interior with wooden walls covered in graffiti including 'NCPD' tags. The metal elevator doors slide shut at the control panel, enclosing the space for the descent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sleek, luxury high-rise apartment that eventually transitions into the gritty interior of a residential elevator. It begins in a modern living room, moving toward floor-to-ceiling windows to reveal the sprawling Night City skyline and a prominent building with 03 signage before turning back into the interior. As the camera glides forward, the scene shifts from the living area to an entertainment space featuring a red pool table and a hexagonal ceiling light, eventually arriving at a bar where a hand interacts with a glowing holographic drink dispenser. The perspective then moves away from the bar and follows the line of windows toward the elevator lobby, keeping the city view in sight until reaching the metal-gated entrance. Finally, the camera enters the elevator, where the polished luxury of the apartment is replaced by wooden walls covered in NCPD graffiti as the metal doors slide shut.
